landing.title: Cà phê như một thói quen đẹp
landing.description: Một không gian nhỏ, mùi rang mới, ánh nắng xiên và playlist vừa đủ chill.

shots.title: City morning
shots.imagePrompt: Wide shot of a small Saigon street at sunrise, warm light, scooters passing, cozy cafe storefront with plants, cinematic, 35mm film look.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-4s: Slow push-in on Saigon street at sunrise, scooters blur in foreground, camera settles on cafe sign.

shots.title: The pour
shots.imagePrompt: Close-up barista hand pouring espresso, crema forming, steam, shallow DOF, warm tones.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-4s: Macro espresso stream, rack focus to crema swirling, handheld micro-movement.

shots.title: The space
shots.imagePrompt: Interior modern Vietnamese cafe, wood textures, rattan chairs, soft sunlight through blinds, people working.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-4s: Slow pan across interior, reveal table with laptop + coffee, shallow DOF.

shots.title: Signature
shots.imagePrompt: Hero shot: iced coffee with condensed milk, condensation, wooden table, dramatic side light, commercial style.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-3s: Hero glass on table, side light, subtle steam. Slow tilt up for brand overlay.

landing.title: Đường cắt biết nói
landing.description: Chất liệu mờ lì, phom đứng, chi tiết xử lý ánh sáng tinh tế.

shots.title: Entrance
shots.imagePrompt: High-fashion editorial, model walking minimal concrete hallway, sharp shadows, dramatic rim light, monochrome.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-4s: Model silhouette enters, slow tracking shot, crisp shadows, editorial pacing.

shots.title: Fabric
shots.imagePrompt: Macro fabric texture, stitching detail, hands adjusting cuff, luxury tactile, shallow DOF.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-4s: Macro fabric glide, hand adjusts cuff, catch light on stitching.

shots.title: Three looks
shots.imagePrompt: Triptych three models different outfits, studio lighting, clean backdrop, premium lookbook.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-4s: Look 1 pose, Look 2 turn, Look 3 step forward.

shots.title: CTA
shots.imagePrompt: Close-up brand tag on clothing, crisp typography, shallow DOF, luxury product photography.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-3s: Slow push-in to brand tag, fade to CTA frame.

landing.title: Biển xanh, mọi thứ khác để sau
landing.description: Phòng nhìn ra chân trời, bữa sáng trên ban công, hoàng hôn kéo dài.

shots.title: Aerial
shots.imagePrompt: Drone aerial tropical beach resort Phu Quoc, turquoise water, palm trees, golden hour, cinematic.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-4s: Drone glides coastline revealing resort, smooth tilt to infinity pool.

shots.title: Room
shots.imagePrompt: Luxury resort room, open curtains, balcony ocean view, soft linen, warm sunlight.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-4s: Slow pan bed to balcony, push through curtains to horizon, gentle flare.

shots.title: Experience
shots.imagePrompt: Montage: breakfast tray balcony, couple beach walk, cocktail infinity pool, premium travel style.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-4s: Breakfast close-up, beach walk wide, cocktail at pool edge, sunset tone.

shots.title: Sunset
shots.imagePrompt: Sunset beach, warm orange sky, silhouettes, gentle waves, cinematic film look.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-3s: Static wide sunset with slow wave motion, fade to CTA frame.

landing.title: Làm việc gọn, đầu óc nhẹ
landing.description: Ghi chú nhanh, nhắc việc đúng lúc, trải nghiệm mượt.

shots.title: Problem
shots.imagePrompt: Messy sticky notes and notifications floating, transforming into clean mobile UI, dark background, neon accent.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-4s: Chaotic notes drifting, motion morph into clean UI cards, lock on phone hero.

shots.title: Feature 1
shots.imagePrompt: Hand holding smartphone, thumb adding quick note, clean UI, soft studio lighting.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-4s: Tap to add note, UI animation, note auto-organizes.

shots.title: Feature 2
shots.imagePrompt: Phone on desk, notification arrives, time-based reminder, modern desk setup.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-4s: Phone idle, notification slides in, camera pulls back to workspace.

shots.title: CTA
shots.imagePrompt: Hero smartphone with app UI, app store layout, neon accent on dark background, premium tech ad.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-3s: Slow push-in phone hero, fade to CTA frame with glow.

landing.title: Ánh sáng là nội thất
landing.description: Cửa kính cao chạm trần, bếp gọn như studio, góc nhìn thành phố.

shots.title: Exterior
shots.imagePrompt: Luxury apartment building exterior at dusk, city lights, modern architecture, premium commercial photography.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-4s: Slow upward tilt from entrance to tower, cut to skyline with building hero.

shots.title: Living room
shots.imagePrompt: High-end living room, floor-to-ceiling windows, warm lighting, minimalist furniture, city view.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-4s: Slow pan across living room, push toward windows, city bokeh outside.

shots.title: Kitchen
shots.imagePrompt: Luxury kitchen, matte stone countertop, modern faucet, premium materials, shallow DOF.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-4s: Countertop detail, water runs briefly, pull back to open kitchen layout.

shots.title: Balcony
shots.imagePrompt: Balcony view city at night, glass railing, cozy chair, premium lifestyle, cinematic.
shots.videoPrompt: 0-3s: Static balcony view with camera drift, fade to CTA frame.
